content.json:
# Sentinel Data Tier Cost Analysis

This workbook automatically analyzes your ingestion volumes and compares costs between the **Analytics tier** and the **Data Lake tier**.

All data is pulled automatically from the built-in `Usage` table -- no manual input required.

---

parameters.name: DataLakeCostPerGB
parameters.label: Data Lake Tier Cost per GB

parameters.name: AnalyticTierTables
parameters.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where IsBillable == true
| distinct DataType
| order by DataType asc
parameters.label: Tables to keep in Analytic Tier

content.query:
let AnalyticCost = toreal('{AnalyticCostPerGB}');
let DataLakeCost = toreal('{DataLakeCostPerGB}');
let Curr = '{CurrencySymbol}';
let AnalyticTables = dynamic([{AnalyticTierTables}]);
let Days = datetime_diff('day', {TimeRange:end}, {TimeRange:start});
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType
| extend DailyAvgGB = TotalMB / 1000.0 / Days
| extend RecommendedTier = iff(DataType in (AnalyticTables), "Analytic", "DataLake")
| summarize
    TotalDailyGB = round(sum(DailyAvgGB), 2),
    AnalyticDailyGB = round(sumif(DailyAvgGB, RecommendedTier == "Analytic"), 2),
    DataLakeDailyGB = round(sumif(DailyAvgGB, RecommendedTier == "DataLake"), 2)
| extend
    CurrentMonthlyCost = round(TotalDailyGB * 30 * AnalyticCost, 2),
    OptimizedMonthlyCost = round((AnalyticDailyGB * 30 * AnalyticCost) + (DataLakeDailyGB * 30 * DataLakeCost), 2)
| extend
    MonthlySavings = round(CurrentMonthlyCost - OptimizedMonthlyCost, 2),
    SavingsPercent = round((CurrentMonthlyCost - OptimizedMonthlyCost) / CurrentMonthlyCost * 100, 1)
| project
    TotalDailyGB,
    AnalyticDailyGB,
    DataLakeDailyGB,
    CurrentMonthlyCost,
    OptimizedMonthlyCost,
    MonthlySavings,
    SavingsPercent
content.title: Summary: Current vs Optimized Cost

content.query:
let AnalyticCost = toreal('{AnalyticCostPerGB}');
let DataLakeCost = toreal('{DataLakeCostPerGB}');
let Curr = '{CurrencySymbol}';
let AnalyticTables = dynamic([{AnalyticTierTables}]);
let Days = datetime_diff('day', {TimeRange:end}, {TimeRange:start});
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType
| extend DailyAvgGB = TotalMB / 1000.0 / Days
| extend RecommendedTier = iff(DataType in (AnalyticTables), "Analytic", "DataLake")
| summarize
    TotalDailyGB = round(sum(DailyAvgGB), 2),
    AnalyticDailyGB = round(sumif(DailyAvgGB, RecommendedTier == "Analytic"), 2),
    DataLakeDailyGB = round(sumif(DailyAvgGB, RecommendedTier == "DataLake"), 2)
| extend
    CurrentMonthlyCost = round(TotalDailyGB * 30 * AnalyticCost, 2),
    OptimizedMonthlyCost = round((AnalyticDailyGB * 30 * AnalyticCost) + (DataLakeDailyGB * 30 * DataLakeCost), 2)
| extend
    MonthlySavings = round(CurrentMonthlyCost - OptimizedMonthlyCost, 2),
    SavingsPercent = round((CurrentMonthlyCost - OptimizedMonthlyCost) / CurrentMonthlyCost * 100, 1)
| project
    Metric = pack_array(
        strcat('Total Daily Ingestion'),
        strcat('Analytic Tier (daily)'),
        strcat('Data Lake Tier (daily)'),
        strcat('Current Monthly Cost'),
        strcat('Optimized Monthly Cost'),
        strcat('Monthly Savings'),
        'Savings'),
    Value = pack_array(
        strcat(tostring(TotalDailyGB), ' GB'),
        strcat(tostring(AnalyticDailyGB), ' GB'),
        strcat(tostring(DataLakeDailyGB), ' GB'),
        strcat(tostring(CurrentMonthlyCost), ' ', Curr),
        strcat(tostring(OptimizedMonthlyCost), ' ', Curr),
        strcat(tostring(MonthlySavings), ' ', Curr),
        strcat(tostring(SavingsPercent), ' %'))
| mv-expand Metric to typeof(string), Value to typeof(string)
content.title: Summary: Current vs Optimized Cost

content.query:
let AnalyticCost = toreal('{AnalyticCostPerGB}');
let DataLakeCost = toreal('{DataLakeCostPerGB}');
let AnalyticTables = dynamic([{AnalyticTierTables}]);
let Days = datetime_diff('day', {TimeRange:end}, {TimeRange:start});
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType
| extend DailyAvgGB = TotalMB / 1000.0 / Days
| extend RecommendedTier = iff(DataType in (AnalyticTables), "Analytic", "DataLake")
| summarize
    CurrentCost = round(sum(DailyAvgGB) * 30 * AnalyticCost, 2),
    OptimizedCost = round(
        (sumif(DailyAvgGB, RecommendedTier == "Analytic") * 30 * AnalyticCost) +
        (sumif(DailyAvgGB, RecommendedTier == "DataLake") * 30 * DataLakeCost), 2)
| project
    CostType = pack_array('Current (All Analytic)', 'Optimized (Tier Split)'),
    Cost = pack_array(CurrentCost, OptimizedCost)
| mv-expand CostType to typeof(string), Cost to typeof(real)
content.title: Monthly Cost Comparison: Current vs Optimized ({CurrencySymbol})
Data Volume Split: Analytic vs Data Lake (GB/day)

content.query:
let AnalyticCost = toreal('{AnalyticCostPerGB}');
let DataLakeCost = toreal('{DataLakeCostPerGB}');
let Curr = '{CurrencySymbol}';
let AnalyticTables = dynamic([{AnalyticTierTables}]);
let Days = datetime_diff('day', {TimeRange:end}, {TimeRange:start});
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by DataType
| extend
    DailyAvgGB = round(TotalMB / 1000.0 / Days, 3),
    RecommendedTier = iff(DataType in (AnalyticTables), "Analytic", "DataLake")
| extend
    CurrentMonthlyCost = round(DailyAvgGB * 30 * AnalyticCost, 2),
    OptimizedMonthlyCost = round(DailyAvgGB * 30 * iff(RecommendedTier == "Analytic", AnalyticCost, DataLakeCost), 2)
| extend
    MonthlySavings = round(CurrentMonthlyCost - OptimizedMonthlyCost, 2),
    SavingsPercent = round((CurrentMonthlyCost - OptimizedMonthlyCost) / CurrentMonthlyCost * 100, 1)
| project
    DataType,
    ['Daily Avg (GB)'] = DailyAvgGB,
    RecommendedTier,
    ['Current Monthly Cost ({CurrencySymbol})'] = CurrentMonthlyCost,
    ['Optimized Monthly Cost ({CurrencySymbol})'] = OptimizedMonthlyCost,
    ['Monthly Savings ({CurrencySymbol})'] = MonthlySavings,
    ['Savings (%)'] = SavingsPercent
| order by ['Monthly Savings ({CurrencySymbol})'] desc
content.title: Per-Table: Tier Recommendation and Savings
Top 15 Tables: Monthly Savings if Moved to Data Lake ({CurrencySymbol})

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize ['Ingestion (GB)'] = round(sum(Quantity) / 1000.0, 3) by bin(StartTime, 1d)
| order by StartTime asc
content.title: Total Daily Billable Ingestion (GB)

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize ['Volume (GB)'] = round(sum(Quantity) / 1000.0, 3) by bin(StartTime, 1d), DataType
| order by StartTime asc, ['Volume (GB)'] desc
content.title: Daily Ingestion by Table (GB)

content.query:
let AnalyticCost = toreal('{AnalyticCostPerGB}');
let DataLakeCost = toreal('{DataLakeCostPerGB}');
let AnalyticTables = dynamic([{AnalyticTierTables}]);
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalMB = sum(Quantity) by bin(StartTime, 1d), DataType
| extend
    DailyGB = TotalMB / 1000.0,
    RecommendedTier = iff(DataType in (AnalyticTables), "Analytic", "DataLake")
| summarize
    ['Current Cost ({CurrencySymbol})'] = round(sum(DailyGB) * AnalyticCost, 2),
    ['Optimized Cost ({CurrencySymbol})'] = round(
        sumif(DailyGB, RecommendedTier == "Analytic") * AnalyticCost +
        sumif(DailyGB, RecommendedTier == "DataLake") * DataLakeCost, 2)
    by bin(StartTime, 1d)
| extend ['Daily Savings ({CurrencySymbol})'] = round(['Current Cost ({CurrencySymbol})'] - ['Optimized Cost ({CurrencySymbol})'], 2)
| order by StartTime asc
content.title: Daily Cost: Current vs Optimized ({CurrencySymbol})
